details.reasoning: Implementation fully meets all rubric requirements. The stepper.tsx component file has 'use client' directive and exports all required sub-components (Stepper, StepperItem, StepperTrigger, StepperTitle, StepperDescription, StepperSeparator, StepperContent) plus StepperIndicator which the demo depends on. All sub-components properly use data-slot attributes and cn() for class merging. React context (StepperContext and StepperItemContext) successfully shares state between components. Both horizontal and vertical orientations are supported via the orientation prop. The demo file demonstrates useState for active step management with two functional examples. Registry entries are correctly added to both _registry.ts files (stepper in ui, stepper-demo in examples). No existing component files were modified, only registry configuration was updated as needed.
